pack.name: Sump Pump Maintenance
pack.description: Sump pump testing, pit cleaning, and backup power checks.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

entity_requirements.name: Sump pump runtime
entity_requirements.description: Optional runtime or power source that indicates the sump pump is running.

tasks.name: Test sump pump
tasks.description: Confirm the sump pump starts, pumps water, and shuts off.
tasks.instructions: Pour water into the pit until the float rises. Confirm the pump starts, drains water, and stops.

tasks.name: Clean sump pit
tasks.description: Remove debris that could jam the float or pump intake.
tasks.instructions: Disconnect power before cleaning. Remove debris, check the float, and restore power.

tasks.name: Inspect sump pump after runtime
tasks.instructions: Inspect pump and pit after extended runtime, especially after storms.
